violations.text: Door gasket of milk chest cooler #1 observed in poor repair, splitting away from the lid. Gasket must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/14/2024
Can opener remains in poor repair. Rusting and pitting observed. Can opener must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The door to the outside, located at the side of the cafeteria, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
Can opener remains in poor repair. Rusting and pitting observed. Can opener must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The door to the outside, located in the cafeteria/kitchen, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/02/2023
Can opener remains in poor repair. Rust and pitting observed. Can opener must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

Milk storage cold hold #3 located in the hallway area is not in good repair. Water builds up in the unit and leaks onto the floor. Towels are in place to catch some of the water. This unit must be properly repaired/replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/13/2023

The receiving door is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
The can opener remains in poor repair. The blade is rusted and pitted. The can opener must be replaced. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 05/15/2023
